Process: melt mixed until the aggregate size was less than 100 nm as measured using scanning electron microscopy
allowed to cool slowly to room temperature, keeping the pressure constant
metallized with ~150 A [˚ ] of sputtered gold
3 min, 6 min and 9 min of argon cleaning
ramp rate of 500 V s [–1] applied to the metallized electrodes
conducted at four different temperatures (25 C, 60 C, 70 C, and 80 C)
allowed 25 samples to be prepared on a single wafer
stressed with a 60 Hz alternating voltage
completed at 25 C, 60 C, 70 C, and 80 C
poling temperature used for all samples was 60 C
temperature ramp rate for the TSC measurements was 2 C/min from 40 C to 100 C
performed over a range of electric fields from 10 [5] V/m to 3 · 10 [7] V/m
